visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman with her hair in a bun, leaning her head towards a red swing rope. The setting is an outdoor park with soft sunlight and a blurred background of greenery and a running track. (2) The scene shifts to a selfie-style shot of the same woman smiling broadly at the camera in a warmly lit indoor environment with a soft-focus background. (3) A medium shot shows the woman sitting on a brown leather couch, holding a green bag of Calbee potato chips and eating one while looking pensively at the camera. (4) The woman is then seen outdoors on a beach at dusk, wearing a white sundress and carrying a woven bag. She walks through shallow water and waves at the camera with a joyful expression. (5) Transition to a dimly lit indoor scene where the woman is seen in profile, looking down with a somber expression; the lighting is low and moody. (6) A handheld shot captures the woman at a birthday celebration, holding a small plush bee toy. A 'HAPPY BIRTHDAY' banner and a panda plush are visible in the background as she laughs and interacts with the toy. (7) A wide shot shows a road intersection with a large 'T' sign near a coastal area under an overcast sky. (8) Inside a vehicle, the woman is seen with sunlight dappling her face as she looks out the window, followed by a shot of her blowing bubbles from a colorful toy wand outdoors. (9) Night scenes follow, showing the woman in a car with rain streaking the windows; she appears distressed, holding her head in her hands. (10) The woman stands alone in a field with barren trees under a grey sky. Double exposure effects are used to overlay her face over the landscape. (11) Rain is seen falling on a wet asphalt road at night with car headlights reflecting on the surface. (12) The video concludes with a close-up portrait of the woman looking directly at the camera with a neutral, serious expression, followed by stylized text overlays.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 你聽見我了沒有. (2) [Subtitle]: 我知道已回不去那時候. (3) [Subtitle]: 雖然沒什麼用. (4) [Subtitle]: 我還是很想要說. (5) [Subtitle]: 雨和眼淚. (6) [Subtitle]: 拼命落下 拼命落下. (7) [Subtitle]: 雨和眼淚呀. (8) [Slogan]: 你聽見我了沒有. [Subtitle]: 七月 feat. 半四分音.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appears in various solo scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, often seen wearing a white knit top or a white sundress, and later a black leather jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video features a variety of settings including a sunlit park with a track, a cozy indoor living room with a leather sofa, a sandy beach at sunset, a dark room for birthday celebrations, and an urban street at night during rain.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a melodic acoustic piano line quickly joined by a powerful female singing voice. The vocals are emotive and clear, accompanied by a steady drum beat. (2) As the track progresses, distorted electric guitars enter the mix, increasing the overall energy and spectral density of the arrangement. (3) Subtle Foley-like sounds of water splashing are briefly layered under the musical climax, synchronized with visual cuts. (4) The singing voice maintains a high melodic contour with significant emotional vibrato. (5) The track reaches a peak in volume and intensity before transitioning to a softer, more reflective vocal outro with sustained piano chords and minimal percussion.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Introduction -> Emotional Buildup -> Climax -> Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a music video or promotional clip for a song, utilizing a montage of emotional and nostalgic visual memories to reflect the themes of the lyrics.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The protagonist is seen clearly eating and holding a bag of Calbee potato chips in one of the segments.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high production value montage editing and song integration to convey a sense of passing time and emotional longing.
